sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الْإِنْسَانَ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى وَقْتٍ لِنَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da čovjek treba vremena za sebe.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that a person needs time for themselves.

sentences.arabic: الِانْفِرَادُ أَحْيَانًا يُجَدِّدُ الطَّاقَةَ وَيُصَفِّي الذِّهْنَ.
sentences.translation: Samoća ponekad obnavlja energiju i bistri um.
sentences.translationEn: Solitude sometimes renews energy and clears the mind.

sentences.arabic: أُخَصِّصُ وَقْتًا كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ لِأَجْلِسَ وَحْدِي وَأَفَكِّرَ.
sentences.translation: Svake sedmice odvojim neko vrijeme da sjedim sam i razmišljam.
sentences.translationEn: I set aside time every week to sit alone and think.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْوَقْتُ يُسَاعِدُنِي عَلَى فَهْمِ نَفْسِي أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: To vrijemos mi pomaže da sebe bolje razumijem.
sentences.translationEn: This time helps me understand myself more.
